title: Date Time Picker
description: A date time picker combines date selection and time selection into a single field, returning a full timestamp.
whenToUse: Use when both date and time are required together — appointment scheduling, event start/end, or timestamp entry.
whenNotToUse: If only the date matters, use Date Picker. If only the time matters, use Time Picker.
acceptanceCriteria: Figma component set exists and exposes variant properties
Examples and Code tabs are generated from inspected Figma structure
Component CSS uses UDS tokens only
Spec JSON reaches required minimum plus props/states/accessibility
knownIssues: Drafted ahead of design — no inspectable component set yet in Figma. Examples, CSS implementation, playground, and Demo Builder entry are intentionally deferred until the Figma component set is available.
